title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 33.320 - Fund commissioners to keep record of proceedings
text:
33.320.  Fund commissioners to keep record of proceedings. — The board of fund commissioners shall keep a record of their proceedings, provide a seal with such device thereon as they may select, and the official acts of the board shall be authenticated by the signatures of the president and secretary with the seal attached.
(RSMo 1939 § 13124, A.L. 1945 p. 1428 § 107) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11504; 1919 § 13403; 1909 § 11904
